message.content:
Several clinics in Houston, TX, offer **Aquagold facial treatments**, a micro-needling procedure using 24k gold-tipped needles to infuse customized serums like Botox, hyaluronic acid, peptides, and vitamins for skin rejuvenation, glow, reduced pores, fine lines, and improved texture.[1][2][3][4]

### Key Clinics and Details
| Clinic | Location/Highlights | Contact Notes |
|--------|---------------------|---------------|
| **Alford Facial Plastic Surgery** (texasface.com) | Houston, TX; Micro-infusion with Botox/fillers/vitamins; results in 3-7 days, last 3-6 months; minimal downtime.[1] | Book consultation via site. |
| **ZO Skin Centre** (houstonskinhealth.com) | Houston; Targets dryness, wrinkles, tone, acne; boosts collagen; personalized.[2] | Available in Houston. |
| **Dr. Sharon Aesthetics** (drsharonaesthetics.com) | Houston, TX; 20-minute treatment with Botox/HA/peptides; all skin types; adds salicylic for acne.[3][7] | Call 832-270-9241. |
| **BCRN Aesthetics** (bcrnaesthetics.com) | Houston Heights/Rice Military; Microchanneling for tone, pores, radiance; little downtime.[4] | Schedule consultation. |
| **Nia Aesthetics** (niaaestheticsmd.com) | Houston; Customized by Dr. Nia (physician); targets forehead/eye wrinkles.[5] | Houston clinic. |
| **Belage Cosmetic Surgery Center** (belagecenter.com) | Houston, TX; Early adopter; uses Botox/fillers/PRP; FDA-registered device; plumps crepey skin.[6] | Quick, painless. |
| **Queen Aesthetics** (queenaesthetics.net) | Houston, TX; Reduces pores, lines, acne scars, pigmentation, crow's feet.[8] | - |
| **Houston Dermatology and Plastic Surgery (HDPS)** (beautybecomesyou.com) | Houston; Smooths lines, minimizes redness/pores, enhances glow.[9] | - |

Most treatments take 20 minutes, have no downtime, suit all skin types, and show results in days with effects lasting months; consult providers for pricing, customization, and aftercare like avoiding makeup for 24 hours.[1][3][6] Note: One result [10] is for Abilene, TX, not Houston.
